title: Curaleaf Reports Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2024 Results
text: Curaleaf reported fourth quarter revenue of $331 million, with adjusted gross margin of 48% and adjusted EBITDA of $76 million or 23%. This represented a year-over-year decrease of 4% compared to Q4 2023 revenue of $345.3 million. Full year 2024 performance showed Curaleaf Holdings maintained a stable revenue of $1.34 billion in 2024 despite a 14% industry-wide price compression. The company's adjusted gross margin increased by 160 basis points to 48%, driven by efficiency and productivity improvements. Curaleaf achieved a 73% growth in its International segment, surpassing the $100 million revenue milestone. The company reduced its acquisition-related debt by $60 million, strengthening its balance sheet. Curaleaf experienced a 4% decrease in fourth-quarter revenue compared to the previous year, with significant price compression in key markets like Pennsylvania, Illinois, and New Jersey. The company reported a net loss from continuing operations of $72 million in the fourth quarter, excluding noncash impairments.
